name: view_incident_hero_tabs
prompt: Create an incident investigation view for the payment-api pod that's crashlooping due to OOM. I want the full investigation layout with hero header, status pipeline, confidence badge, resolution steps, blast radius, and a timeline.

recorded_responses.get_pod_logs:
2024-01-15T14:30:01Z [ERROR] java.lang.OutOfMemoryError: Java heap space

2024-01-15T14:29:55Z [WARN] Heap usage at 95%: 486Mi/512Mi
